title: Atomic Settings
description: Configuration file for the Atomic CLI (@bastani/atomic). Stored at ~/.atomic/settings.json (global) or .atomic/settings.json (project-local).

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor intellisense.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last configuration update.

trustedPaths.description: Globally trusted workspaces that have completed provider onboarding through 'atomic init'.

workspacePath.description: Absolute path to the initialized workspace.

provider.description: Provider initialized for the trusted workspace.
